description.content: Managed and unmanaged product recommendation requests.

Returns one or more recommendation result sets, supporting both managed (pre-configured) and unmanaged (custom) recommendation requests. A single user identifier (trackingUserId, email, or customerId) may accompany the request to enable personalization.

response.name: Recommendation results

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
On-site search across products, categories, brands, and content.

Performs a search against a configured search key and returns matching products and optionally categories, brands, blog posts, site pages, and redirects. Supports pagination, filtering, sorting, and faceting.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

  "query": "<string>",
  "key": "<string>",
  "id": "<integer>",
  "trackingUserId": "<string>",
  "format": "json",

  "includeRetailMediaInReview": "<boolean>",

description.content: Page-driven product listings with filtering and sorting.
Returns the product listing rendered by the page configuration identified by key. Supports filters, sorting, pagination, and a first-load flag for analytics view tracking.

variable.description: (Required) Page configuration key from My Hello Retail.
(Required) Page configuration key from My Hello Retail.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieve weighted customer preference data for personalization.
Returns weighted preference values for the requested fields for a given customer identifier. Used to drive personalization based on observed behavior.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Hello Retail provides REST APIs for personalized product recommendations, on-site search, page-driven product listings, and customer bias retrieval. Endpoints are served from the core.helloretail.com host and accept JSON request bodies. Most endpoints expect a Bearer token issued from the My Hello Retail dashboard. The API powers e-commerce personalization use cases including product discovery, behavioral tracking, and merchandising.

Contact Support:
 Name: Hello Retail
